name: Stay in Ujjain
shortDescription: The most convenient base when Mahakal darshan and the old-city temple circuit are the priority.
longDescription: Ujjain reduces daily transfers and supports early starts, but rooms may sell quickly and traffic controls can change local access during Kumbh periods.
idealDuration: 2–4 nights for most family and spiritual trips.
mapSearchQuery: family hotels near Mahakaleshwar Temple Ujjain

name: Stay in Indore
shortDescription: A comfortable base for airport access, wider hotel choice, food and multiple day trips.
longDescription: Indore works well for travelers who value hotel variety and dining, provided the group is comfortable with an early road or rail transfer to Ujjain.
idealDuration: 2–5 nights when combining Ujjain with Malwa day trips.

name: Stay in Bhopal
shortDescription: A strong base for Sanchi, Bhimbetka, lakes and a longer Madhya Pradesh circuit.
longDescription: Bhopal should be treated as a separate circuit base rather than a daily commute to Ujjain. It suits travelers with five to seven days or more.
idealDuration: 2–3 nights within a longer Madhya Pradesh itinerary.
